How Much Are You Willing to Sacrifice for What You Want?

We all have to make choices. HexSchool's CEO Liao once shared a video on the full frontend job-hunt playbook, and at one point he talks about how much you're willing to sacrifice to reach your goals. Lately I've been thinking about that question with my own life, so here's a personal post.
Mindset Adjustments When Learning Something New

Helping out a few friends with their learning blockers lately, I kept noticing the same patterns popping up — patterns I'd hit myself early on. So I figured I'd write down what I learned the hard way.
How to Properly Learn Frontend Tech or Programming Languages

Why am I writing this? Since switching to frontend engineering and joining HexSchool, friends, online friends, and classmates have kept asking me how to learn frontend like I did. I thought about it for a while before writing this experience-sharing post.
